_comment: Two-tier merge policy — consumed by merge-on-command.yml (read from MAIN,
never from the PR head, so a PR cannot reclassify its own paths).
Rules are evaluated per changed file, FIRST MATCH WINS (fnmatch globs).
A PR's class is the STRICTEST class of any changed file: one 'human' file
makes the whole PR human-approval. Files matching no rule default to
auto  — the PM (bui-agent[bot]) may /merge on green without a human.
human — only @antoinedc's /merge passes; the PM must request approval.
Rationale per human rule: CI/workflow files gate everything (self-
modification = gate bypass); scripts run on the box; package manifests
are the supply chain; auth/webhooks/secrets/index are the security
boundary of the exposed server; pty/transport execute on remote hosts;
opencode-tools ship instructions to every AI session; .multica rewires
